task: I need to text my supervisor that I can cover part of a shift but not the whole thing. Can you draft it in a way that’s clear and ready to send, without making it sound too stiff?

turns.agent_response:
Sure — here’s a clear, casual version you can send:

“Hey [Supervisor’s Name], I can cover part of the shift, but I won’t be able to do the whole thing. Let me know what part you’d like me to take.”

If you want, I can also make it sound:
- more professional
- more friendly
- more firm/short

user_simulator.text: Yeah, that works. Plain and clear. I can use that.
